estimator_validation.program_g_anchor_point_check: PASS (H_PI~0.015 H_obs~-0.02 at commonality=0, after fixing the ABAB/BABA static instability)

static_baseline: strongest full-contract periodic calendar in-sample on eval tapes (A/B-symmetry-aware, stable, conservative headroom)

decision_rule.new_lane_if: GP-located region has H_obs LCB95 >= 0.01 AND eta >= 0.30 on >=200 fresh tapes (then preregistered G/H gate, NOT a rescue)
decision_rule.else: the map is the result: formal boundary characterization

anti_p_hacking: no factor range chosen by learner performance
a located region is a new preregistered lane, never a GSA managerial claim
